title: senecio megaoreinus
intro: Senecio megaoreinus, also known as Groundsel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The plant contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which may have hepatotoxic effects, but in moderation, it has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, coughs, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Groundsel include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost immune function.
